description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with translucent overlays and a distinctive orange-tinted sole. The shoe has a modern, layered design with visible stitching and a bold, angular side accent in gray. The lacing system is traditional, running through reinforced eyelets up to the ankle collar, which provides additional support. The midsole and outsole are thick and robust, with a segmented, translucent orange appearance that suggests both style and cushioning. The toe box is rounded and reinforced, while the heel area is structured for stability. Overall, the shoe combines contemporary aesthetics with functional elements suitable for urban environments.
description: A high-top white sneaker with translucent overlays and a bold orange sole, featuring a modern, layered design and traditional lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white upper, gray accent, and the full length of the orange translucent sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central lacing, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mirrored design elements and the orange sole's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the structured heel and the orange sole wrapping around the back.
